description_long: This is a streamlined electric locomotive with a rounded front and rear, painted primarily in blue with a wide yellow band running horizontally along its midsection. The roof features two prominent red pantographs for overhead electric power collection, and a large black equipment box is centrally mounted. The sides display a series of rectangular windows and small access panels, with black bogies and wheels visible beneath the body. The front and rear both have large, dark windshields and headlights, with a grille and buffer details at the base. The overall design suggests a mid-20th-century European or Soviet-style electric locomotive, built for mainline passenger or mixed-traffic service.
description: A blue and yellow streamlined electric locomotive with red pantographs, rectangular side windows, and a rounded front and rear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose, large windshield, headlights, and grille details.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length, yellow band, rectangular windows, red pantographs, and black bogies.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with rounded end, windshield, and buffer details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1 with visible windows, pantographs, and undercarriage.
attribute_window_arrangement: spaced rectangular windows along both sides
